nodes.name: Xenopirostris
nodes.summary: Xenopirostris（Xenopirostris）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联3种鸟类，如Pollen's vanga、Lafresnaye's vanga、Van Dam's vanga。

nodes.name: 鸟纲
nodes.summary: 鸟纲（Aves）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: Van Dam's vanga
nodes.summary: Van Dam's vanga (Xenopirostris damii) is a species of bird in the family Vangidae. It is endemic to Madagascar. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical dry forests. Males may be identified by their black hood whereas females have only a black cap. Conservation status At present, the species is endangered under the ICUN Species Red List. It has a decreasing population trend of between 1500 and 7000 individuals. The species inhabits a very small range, isolated to just two confirmed sites, one of which is the Ankarafantsika National Park. Its habitat is under increasing pressure from human encroachment and fire. References External links Media related to Xenopirostris damii at Wikimedia Commons BirdLife Species Factsheet.
nodes.shortSummary: Van Dam's vanga (Xenopirostris damii) is a species of bird in the family Vangidae. It is endemic to Madagascar.
